response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role. There is a severe seniority mismatch — overqualification creates high flight risk and likely salary expectation gap. Java is listed but not a primary stack (mostly TypeScript, Node.js, DLang). German is only basic, while the role requires strong German proficiency for German insurance clients. No insurance domain experience.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background including Java exposure at Altom Consulting and National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, agile, pairing — directly aligned with agile delivery
Berlin-based with EU work authorization and willingness to travel within Germany feasible
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role — retention and motivation risk
German listed as only 'Basic' — role requires strong verbal and written German for insurance clients
Java is not a core/recent stack; primary expertise is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, no insurance domain experience
